name: @universal-robots/urcap-utils
description: Utilities for working with the URCapX contributions

scripts.pre-generate-openapi-clients: rimraf external-src/urservice bin/lib/external-urcap-api && mkdir -p external-src/urservice && openapi-generator-cli generate -i external-api/urcap-system-api-urservice-openapi.json -g javascript -o external-src/urservice
scripts.generate-openapi-clients: npm run pre-generate-openapi-clients && npm --prefix external-src/urservice install && ncp external-src/urservice/dist bin/lib/external-urcap-api
